---
title: "Shunyu Wu"
subtitle: "Decision-Focused Learning and Optimization for Reliable Real-World Systems"
description: "Ph.D. candidate at Shanghai Jiao Tong University working on decision-focused learning, constrained optimization, and deployable AI systems for energy and water infrastructure."
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Shunyu Wu",
  "url": "https://shunyuwu-shaun.github.io",
  "affiliation": {
    "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
    "name": "Shanghai Jiao Tong University"
  },
  "jobTitle": "Ph.D. Candidate",
  "email": "mailto:shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn",
  "sameAs": [
    "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao",
    "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148",
    "https://github.com/ShunyuWu-Shaun"
  ]
}
</script>

::: {.hero-layout}
::: {.hero-card .hero-main}
## About

I am a Ph.D. candidate in **Control Science and Engineering** at **Shanghai Jiao Tong University**. My research focuses on **decision-focused learning (DFL)**, **predict-then-optimize (PtO)**, and **constrained optimization** for safety-critical, real-time systems.

::: {.hero-lead}
I work on both method and deployment: stable end-to-end training, uncertain constraints, and long-running optimization pipelines in thermal power and urban water infrastructure.
:::

::: {.hero-buttons}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao)
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148)
[GitHub](https://github.com/ShunyuWu-Shaun)
[Download CV](/cv/)
:::

::: {.interest-chips}
<span class="interest-chip">Decision-Focused Learning</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Constrained PtO</span>
<span class="interest-chip">MILP + Surrogates</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Infrastructure AI</span>
<span class="interest-chip">Deployment Reliability</span>
:::
:::

::: {.profile-card}
![](/assets/images/shunyu-wu-avatar.jpg){.profile-photo alt="Shunyu Wu profile photo"}

<div>
<div class="profile-name">Shunyu Wu</div>
<div class="profile-role">Ph.D. Candidate, Shanghai Jiao Tong University</div>
<div class="profile-role">Decision-focused learning, optimization, and deployable AI systems</div>
</div>
:::
:::

::: {.snapshot-grid}
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">3+</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">First-author publications</div>
:::
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">2</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">Deployment domains (Power, Water)</div>
:::
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">14</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">Students co-mentored (1 Ph.D. + 13 M.Sc.)</div>
:::
::: {.snapshot-item}
<div class="snapshot-number">2026</div>
<div class="snapshot-label">Expected Ph.D. graduation</div>
:::
:::

<hr class="page-section-divider" />

## Research Highlights

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### Stable Dynamics for End-to-End DFL
I study instability caused by piecewise-constant argmin maps and propose stabilization methods including variational free-energy regularization and proximal updates with inexact surrogate gradients.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Constrained PtO with Learned Constraints
I extend DFL beyond objective uncertainty by modeling uncertain constraints, introducing dual-gap regret objectives and feasibility-preserving solver ideas.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Deployable Decision Pipelines for Infrastructure
I integrate graph/physics-informed surrogates with LP/MILP optimization and engineering safeguards (feasible-set tightening, rollback, monitoring) for long-running operation.
:::
:::

## Selected Publications

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling (IEEE TSG, 2025)
DOI: [10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238)
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Knowledge-based Bi-correction Model for Lag-free Daily Urban Water Demand Forecasting (ESWA, 2024)
DOI: [10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508)
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### CritiCoder: End-to-End Uncertain Regression for Robust Macroscopic Pressure Models in WDN (IEEE TCSS, 2023)
DOI: [10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330](https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330)
:::
:::

For complete records, see [Publications](/publications/).

## Selected Deployments

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### Thermal Power Plant Closed-loop Efficiency Optimization
Cross-site deployment on 330 MW and 660 MW coal-fired units with stable operation and measurable energy gains under strict safety and environmental constraints.

Details: [Projects](/projects/)
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Urban Water Utility Pump Scheduling and Anomaly-Aware Control
SCADA-integrated forecast-optimize pipeline for pump scheduling and pressure compliance in Shanghai demonstration settings.

Details: [Projects](/projects/)
:::
:::

## Common Academic Sections

::: {.two-col-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
#### Academic Service
- Conference reviewing: ICLR, AAAI, CDC, IFAC-related venues.
- Journal reviewing: IEEE TSMC Systems, IEEE TASE, IEEE TIV.
- Mentoring: 1 Ph.D. and 13 M.Sc. students co-mentored.

More: [Service](/service/)
:::
::: {.feature-card}
#### News and Collaboration
- Publication status updates and deployment milestones.
- Ongoing collaborations in optimization, control, and industrial AI.
- Research contact and profile links for quick reach-out.

Browse: [News](/news/) and [Contact](/contact/)
:::
:::

## Visitor Insights

::: {.section-note}
The module below shows total page views, unique visitors, current visitor region, and a 3D globe view.
:::

::: {.visitor-grid}
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Page Views</span><span class="value" id="visitor-pv">--</span></div>
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Unique Visitors</span><span class="value" id="visitor-uv">--</span></div>
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Current Visitor Region</span><span class="value" id="visitor-geo">Detecting...</span></div>
:::

<div class="visitor-counter">
<div class="visitor-globe" id="visitor-globe-home"></div>
<p class="globe-note">3D globe shows the current visitor position and the research home base (Shanghai).</p>
</div>

## Latest News

- **2026-02**: Visual refresh with a softer interface style and 3D visitor globe.
- **2026-02**: Site migrated from legacy URL `shuanyuwu.github.io` to `shunyuwu-shaun.github.io`.
- **2025-11**: IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid paper indexed with DOI.
- **2025-08**: Two DFL manuscripts submitted (NeurIPS cycle).
- **2025-05**: Thermal-power optimization system entered long-run production operation.
